name: crop-connect
description: CropConnect - Decentralized Agricultural Supply Chain Platform

scripts.deploy:contracts: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -s first "npm run blockchain" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8545 && npm run deploy:contracts" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8545 && npm run server" "wait-on http://localhost:5000/health && npm run client"
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client

author: CropConnect Team
